channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Harbaugh brothers share hug at midfield before facing each other for 3rd time
item.description: John and Jim Harbaugh hugged at midfield during pregame warmups as the Baltimore Ravens took on the Los Angeles Chargers.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Memphis beats No. 2 UConn 99-97 in overtime to tip off Maui Invitational
item.description: Tyrese Hunter scored 17 of his 26 points after halftime to lead Memphis to a 99-97 overtime win against two-time defending national champion and second-ranked UConn in the first round of the Maui Invitational.
item.dc:creator: Kalani Takase, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 49ers: Brock Purdy throws without pain, while it’s wait-and-see for Bosa, Williams
item.description: The 49ers are taking stock of their injury situation but expect to get some key players back on the practice field.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks back at dominating win over the Giants
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers returned from their bye week in dominating fashion with a 30-7 win over the New York Giants that ended a four-game losing streak and helped their playoff hopes in the process.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: SJSU trans women's volleyball player Blaire Fleming gets green light to play conference tourney
item.description: San Jose State's transgender women's volleyball player given the OK to play in the Mountain West Conference tournament, a judge ruled on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Players allege embattled ex-Oregon State volleyball coach used same abusive tactics in Australia
item.description: Reporting by The Associated Press about abusive culture in Oregon State's volleyball program led to an outpouring of similar stories from the coach's homeland of Australia, where a four-year process led officials there to apologize to athletes who had played in his program.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sharks’ first-round pick reportedly breaks hand, will not play in WJC
item.description: San Jose Sharks prospect reportedly out for IIHF World Junior Championships run from Dec. 26 to Jan. 5 in Ottawa.
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: AP Top 25 Extra Points: No. 14 ASU, No. 17 Iowa St front-runners in what could be wild Big 12 finish
item.description: With more than half of the 16 teams still mathematically alive to make the conference championship game, the Big 12 will command a lot of attention in the final week of the regular season. No. 14 Arizona State and No.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Two senators urge FIFA not to pick Saudi Arabia as 2034 host
item.description: Democrats Ron Wyden of Oregon and Dick Durbin of Illinois have told FIFA president Gianni Infantino in a letter “we urge you to seek out a host country with a record of upholding human rights.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Baker Mayfield seeks $12M in lawsuit against father's company
item.description: An ongoing dispute between Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield and his family has boiled over.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: UCLA women looking for more after upsetting South Carolina. First win over No. 1 team in 21 tries
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The celebrating had barely died down when UCLA coach Cori Close felt the need for some perspective after her fifth-ranked Bruins shocked No. 1 South Carolina Sunday. “It's only November 24,” she said. “Am I proud of our team? Yes, but this is just the beginning.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Week 12 was filled with sloppy play, especially on special teams: Analysis
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ Missed kicks. Poor tackling. Costly penalties. Week 12 was filled with sloppy play around the NFL, leading to some upsets and surprising outcomes.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Andy Murray will coach Novak Djokovic through the Australian Open
item.description: The recently retired Andy Murray is going to team up with longtime rival Novak Djokovic as his coach, they both announced Saturday, with plans to prepare for — and work together through — the Australian Open in January.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: GJ Tigers Football season recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—"It's hard to end an era with this senior class because they’re a special group of kids," said Head Coach Landon McKee. "They changed this program, and they get the credit for that.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Purdy, Bosa out for Green Bay matchup, Allen steps up as QB
item.description: (KRON) – San Francisco 49ers head coach Kyle Shanahan announced in a press conference Friday that quarterback Brock Purdy will be out for Sunday’s game against the Green Bay Packers. Purdy injured his right shoulder in last Sunday's loss to the Seattle Seahawks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: No ball at Tropicana Field in 2026 after Milton; new ballpark deal dies: Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council has voted to spend over $23 million to repair Tropicana Field after Hurricane Milton destroyed the roof on the home of the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, Fox 5

item.title: Corner Canyon wins back-to-back 6A championships
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Corner Canyon dynasty continues. The Chargers won their second straight 6A state championship, and fourth in the last six years, with a hard-fought 30-27 win over Lone Peak, avenging their lone loss in the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LeBron James announces he's leaving social media
item.description: LeBron James is taking a break from social media, citing negativity online. The Lakers star posted a screengrab of a post from Rich Kleiman, Kevin Durant's longtime agent, to X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KTLA 5

item.title: Bulls have no answers for Giannis, fall to Bucks, 122-106
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — The Bulls answered the bell Wednesday night after trailing the Milwaukee Bucks by 18 points in the first half. They just had no answer for Giannis Antetokounmpo.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Teen Paves the Way for Female Hockey Players
item.description: Chloe Jezek, a 16-year-old high school hockey player in North County, is paving the way for other girls in the male-dominated sport.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Cubs trade for Cleveland reliever Eli Morgan; Wisdom DFA'd
item.description: CLEVELAND, Ind. — The Cubs are trading for Cleveland relief pitcher Eli Morgan. As a result of adding Morgan to the 40-man, Patrick Wisdom was designated for assignment. Morgan, 28, had the best season of his career in 2024 with a 1.93 ERA with Cleveland in 42 innings.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Legion to play in new stadium next year
item.description: Snapdragon Stadium will no longer be the home for the San Diego Legion as the professional rugby team will be heading back to Torero Stadium at the University of San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Brayden Point's OT winner helps Lightning rally past Penguins, 3-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored at 3:58 of overtime and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Pittsburgh Penguins 3-2 on Tuesday night. Point’s overtime winner was his 10th goal of the season. Anthony Cirelli scored his fifth goal of the season. Andrei Vasilevskiy stopped 17 shots for Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU and Arizona State both have exceeded expectations
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU is still in the College Football Playoffs as of now, but they desperately need a win over #21 Arizona State in Tempe this Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox call up Colson Montgomery, Juan Carela from minor leagues
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have selected the contracts of shortstop Colson Montgomery and right-handed pitcher Juan Carela, both of whom are highly rated in the organization, to their 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ovechkin scores twice as Washington beats Utah, 6-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - One of the joys of having an NHL team is to watch the game's greatest players come to Salt Lake City. On Monday, the great Alex Ovechkin put on a show for the Utah Hockey Club fans.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
